ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the measure */,
  "statistic_value_name" TEXT /* Type of statistic value (e.g., count, ratio, percentage) */,
  "stratum_1_name" TEXT /* Stratum level for the measure, if applicable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of what the measure represents */,
  "associated_rules" INTEGER /* Number of rules associated with the measure */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the measure */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the measure */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the measure was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the measure was last modified */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the measure is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialization of the provider */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the provider */,
  "practice_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider's practice */,
  "practice_address" TEXT /* Address of the provider's practice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider for the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient from whom the measurement was taken */,
  "measure_id" TEXT /* ID of the measure being recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the measurement value */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used for the measurement */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider who recorded the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unmapped_data" (
  "unmapped_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unmapped data entry */,
  "measure_id" TEXT /* ID of the measure associated with the unmapped data */,
  "source_value" TEXT /* Source value that is unmapped */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the unmapped data was recorded */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used for the unmapped data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unmapped_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unmapped_data_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deciles" (
  "decile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decile */,
  "decile_range" TEXT /* Range of the decile (e.g., 0-10, 11-20) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description explaining the decile categorization */,
  "start_age" INTEGER /* Start age of the decile range */,
  "end_age" INTEGER /* End age of the decile range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "measure_id" TEXT /* ID of the measure it relates to */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of rule (e.g., threshold, ratio) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measure */,
  "measure_id" TEXT /* ID of the measure being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content or findings of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measure_provider_bridge" (
  "bridge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bridge entry */,
  "measure_id" TEXT /* ID of the measure */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bridge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measure_provider_bridge_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measure_provider_bridge_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_decile_bridge" (
  "bridge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bridge entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "decile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the decile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bridge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_decile_bridge_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_decile_bridge_decile_id FOREIGN KEY ("decile_id") REFERENCES deciles ("decile_id")
)
